speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: You do not meet a man but frowns. Our bloods

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: No more obey the heavens than our courtiers’

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Still seem as does the King’s.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: But what’s the matter?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: His daughter, and the heir of ’s kingdom, whom

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: He purposed to his wife’s sole son—a widow

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: That late he married—hath referred herself

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Unto a poor but worthy gentleman. She’s wedded,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Her husband banished, she imprisoned. All

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Is outward sorrow, though I think the King

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Be touched at very heart.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: None but the King?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: He that hath lost her, too. So is the Queen,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: That most desired the match. But not a courtier,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Although they wear their faces to the bent

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Of the King’s looks, hath a heart that is not

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Glad at the thing they scowl at.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: And why so?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: He that hath missed the Princess is a thing

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Too bad for bad report, and he that hath her—

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I mean, that married her, alack, good man!

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: And therefore banished—is a creature such

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: As, to seek through the regions of the Earth

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: For one his like, there would be something failing

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: In him that should compare. I do not think

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: So fair an outward and such stuff within

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Endows a man but he.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: You speak him far.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I do extend him, sir, within himself,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Crush him together rather than unfold

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: His measure duly.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: What’s his name and birth?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I cannot delve him to the root. His father

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Was called Sicilius, who did join his honor

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Against the Romans with Cassibelan,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: But had his titles by Tenantius, whom

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: He served with glory and admired success,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: So gained the sur-addition Leonatus;

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: And had, besides this gentleman in question,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Two other sons, who in the wars o’ th’ time

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Died with their swords in hand. For which their father,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Then old and fond of issue, took such sorrow

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: That he quit being; and his gentle lady,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Big of this gentleman our theme, deceased

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: As he was born. The King he takes the babe

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: To his protection, calls him Posthumus Leonatus,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Breeds him and makes him of his bedchamber,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Puts to him all the learnings that his time

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Could make him the receiver of, which he took

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: As we do air, fast as ’twas ministered,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: And in ’s spring became a harvest; lived in court—

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Which rare it is to do—most praised, most loved,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: A sample to the youngest, to th’ more mature

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: A glass that feated them, and to the graver

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: A child that guided dotards. To his mistress,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: For whom he now is banished, her own price

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Proclaims how she esteemed him; and his virtue

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: By her election may be truly read

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: What kind of man he is.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I honor him

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Even out of your report. But pray you tell me,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Is she sole child to th’ King?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: His only child.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: He had two sons—if this be worth your hearing,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Mark it—the eldest of them at three years old,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I’ th’ swathing clothes the other, from their nursery

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Were stol’n, and to this hour no guess in knowledge

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Which way they went.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: How long is this ago?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Some twenty years.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: That a king’s children should be so conveyed,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: So slackly guarded, and the search so slow

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: That could not trace them!

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Howsoe’er ’tis strange,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Or that the negligence may well be laughed at,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Yet is it true, sir.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I do well believe you.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: We must forbear. Here comes the gentleman,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: The Queen and Princess.

speaker: QUEEN
text: No, be assured you shall not find me, daughter,

speaker: QUEEN
text: After the slander of most stepmothers,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Evil-eyed unto you. You’re my prisoner, but

speaker: QUEEN
text: Your jailer shall deliver you the keys

speaker: QUEEN
text: That lock up your restraint.—For you, Posthumus,

speaker: QUEEN
text: So soon as I can win th’ offended king,

speaker: QUEEN
text: I will be known your advocate. Marry, yet

speaker: QUEEN
text: The fire of rage is in him, and ’twere good

speaker: QUEEN
text: You leaned unto his sentence with what patience

speaker: QUEEN
text: Your wisdom may inform you.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Please your Highness,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I will from hence today.

speaker: QUEEN
text: You know the peril.

speaker: QUEEN
text: I’ll fetch a turn about the garden, pitying

speaker: QUEEN
text: The pangs of barred affections, though the King

speaker: QUEEN
text: Hath charged you should not speak together.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: O,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Dissembling courtesy! How fine this tyrant

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Can tickle where she wounds! My dearest husband,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I something fear my father’s wrath, but nothing—

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Always reserved my holy duty—what

speaker: IMOGEN
text: His rage can do on me. You must be gone,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And I shall here abide the hourly shot

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Of angry eyes, not comforted to live

speaker: IMOGEN
text: But that there is this jewel in the world

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That I may see again.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: My queen, my mistress!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: O lady, weep no more, lest I give cause

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To be suspected of more tenderness

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Than doth become a man. I will remain

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The loyal’st husband that did e’er plight troth.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: My residence in Rome at one Philario’s,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Who to my father was a friend, to me

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Known but by letter; thither write, my queen,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And with mine eyes I’ll drink the words you send,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Though ink be made of gall.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Be brief, I pray you.

speaker: QUEEN
text: If the King come, I shall incur I know not

speaker: QUEEN
text:
How much of his displeasure.
                 
                (
                Aside
                .
                )
               Yet I’ll move him

speaker: QUEEN
text: To walk this way. I never do him wrong

speaker: QUEEN
text: But he does buy my injuries, to be friends,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Pays dear for my offenses.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Should we be taking leave

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: As long a term as yet we have to live,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The loathness to depart would grow. Adieu.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Nay, stay a little!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Were you but riding forth to air yourself,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Such parting were too petty. Look here, love:

speaker: IMOGEN
text: This diamond was my mother’s.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Take it, heart,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: But keep it till you woo another wife

speaker: IMOGEN
text: When Imogen is dead.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: How, how? Another?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: You gentle gods, give me but this I have,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And cere up my embracements from a next

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: With bonds of death.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Remain, remain thou here,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: While sense can keep it on.—And sweetest, fairest,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: As I my poor self did exchange for you

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To your so infinite loss, so in our trifles

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I still win of you. For my sake, wear this.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: It is a manacle of love. I’ll place it

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Upon this fairest prisoner.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: O the gods!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: When shall we see again?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Alack, the King.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Thou basest thing, avoid hence, from my sight!

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: If after this command thou fraught the court

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: With thy unworthiness, thou diest. Away!

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Thou ’rt poison to my blood.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The gods protect you,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And bless the good remainders of the court.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I am gone.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: There cannot be a pinch in death

speaker: IMOGEN
text: More sharp than this is.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: O disloyal thing

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: That shouldst repair my youth, thou heap’st

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: A year’s age on me.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I beseech you, sir,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Harm not yourself with your vexation.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I am senseless of your wrath. A touch more rare

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Subdues all pangs, all fears.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Past grace? Obedience?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Past hope and in despair; that way past grace.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: That mightst have had the sole son of my queen!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: O, blessèd that I might not! I chose an eagle

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And did avoid a puttock.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Thou took’st a beggar, wouldst have made my throne

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: A seat for baseness.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: No, I rather added

speaker: IMOGEN
text: A luster to it.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: O thou vile one!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Sir,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: It is your fault that I have loved Posthumus.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You bred him as my playfellow, and he is

speaker: IMOGEN
text: A man worth any woman, overbuys me

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Almost the sum he pays.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: What, art thou mad?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Almost, sir. Heaven restore me! Would I were

speaker: IMOGEN
text: A neatherd’s daughter, and my Leonatus

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Our neighbor shepherd’s son.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Thou foolish thing!

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: They were again together. You have done

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Not after our command. Away with her

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: And pen her up.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Beseech your patience.—Peace,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Dear lady daughter, peace.—Sweet sovereign,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Leave us to ourselves, and make yourself some comfort

speaker: QUEEN
text: Out of your best advice.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Nay, let her languish

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: A drop of blood a day, and being aged

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Die of this folly.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Fie, you must give way.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Here is your servant.—How now, sir? What news?

speaker: PISANIO
text: My lord your son drew on my master.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Ha?

speaker: QUEEN
text: No harm, I trust, is done?

speaker: PISANIO
text: There might have been,

speaker: PISANIO
text: But that my master rather played than fought

speaker: PISANIO
text: And had no help of anger. They were parted

speaker: PISANIO
text: By gentlemen at hand.

speaker: QUEEN
text: I am very glad on ’t.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Your son’s my father’s friend; he takes his part

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To draw upon an exile. O, brave sir!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I would they were in Afric both together,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Myself by with a needle, that I might prick

speaker: IMOGEN
text: The goer-back.—Why came you from your master?

speaker: PISANIO
text: On his command. He would not suffer me

speaker: PISANIO
text: To bring him to the haven, left these notes

speaker: PISANIO
text: Of what commands I should be subject to

speaker: PISANIO
text: When ’t pleased you to employ me.

speaker: QUEEN
text: This hath been

speaker: QUEEN
text: Your faithful servant. I dare lay mine honor

speaker: QUEEN
text: He will remain so.

speaker: PISANIO
text: I humbly thank your Highness.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Pray, walk awhile.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: About some half hour hence,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Pray you, speak with me. You shall at least

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Go see my lord aboard. For this time leave me.
